name: Sweet and Sour Tvp® with Pineapple
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the TVP® chunks, ketchup, and hot water in a bowl. Let stand for 5 minutes.
2. Cover tightly and microwave on medium high power for 10 minutes or until tender but not mushy (if using less than half a cup of liquid, simmer in a covered pan for 20-30 minutes).
3. Bring 1 cup water to a boil and add the sliced carrots and pepper. Cook for 2 minutes to make them crisp-tender. Remove from heat and drain.
4. Return the cooking liquid to the pan and add pineapple juice.
5. Bring the liquid to a boil, then stir in sugar and cider vinegar.
6. In a small bowl, combine cornstarch and tamari. Stir this mixture into the hot sauce; it will thicken almost immediately.
7. Add the cooked TVP®, carrots, pepper, and pineapple to the sauce. Serve over rice or crisp chow mein noodles. This dish can be made ahead of time and reheated later.
